ddls:
CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variety */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species to which the variety belongs */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the variety */,
  "height" TEXT /* Average height of the variety */,
  "width" TEXT /* Average width of the variety */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the variety */,
  "hardiness" TEXT /* Hardiness zone or temperature tolerance */,
  "foliage" TEXT /* Color and texture of the foliage */,
  "flower" TEXT /* Flower characteristics (if any) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the variety */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Rate of growth */,
  "maturity_period" INTEGER /* Time taken for the plant to reach maturity */,
  "toxicity_level" TEXT /* Level of toxicity */,
  "attracting_beneficial_insects" INTEGER /* Whether the plant attracts beneficial insects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_varieties_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the species belongs */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Geographic origin of the species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nurseries" (
  "nursery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nursery */,
  "nursery_name" TEXT /* Name of the nursery */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the nursery */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the nursery */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the nursery */,
  "nursery_type" TEXT /* Type of nursery */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the nursery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nursery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "nursery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nursery where the variety is stored */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variety */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variety in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "location_within_nursery" TEXT /* Location within the nursery where the variety is stored */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when inventory falls below the reorder point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_nursery_id FOREIGN KEY ("nursery_id") REFERENCES nurseries ("nursery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory entry being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the health record */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the variety */,
  "growth_status" TEXT /* Growth status of the variety */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the health and growth */,
  "pests_or_diseases" TEXT /* Pests or diseases affecting the plant */,
  "treatment_applied" TEXT /* Treatment applied to address pests or diseases */,
  "monitoring_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of monitoring for health issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "care_instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of care instructions */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variety */,
  "watering_instructions" TEXT /* Watering instructions for the variety */,
  "sunlight_requirements" TEXT /* Sunlight requirements for the variety */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type recommended for the variety */,
  "fertilizer_recommendations" TEXT /* Fertilizer recommendations for the variety */,
  "pruning_tips" TEXT /* Pruning tips for the variety */,
  "disease_prevention" TEXT /* Disease prevention methods for the variety */,
  "mulching_instructions" TEXT /* Mulching instructions for the variety */,
  "support_required" INTEGER /* Whether the variety requires support */,
  "special_care_notes" TEXT /* Special care notes for the variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_care_instructions_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of access for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_module" TEXT /* Module accessed by the user */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variety being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variety ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_orders_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
